feed.title: Google Cloud: App Optimize API
feed.subtitle: Changelog for Google Cloud product: App Optimize API

entry.content: App Optimize API is in Preview. App Optimize API helps you to monitor, analyze, and improve the performance and cost-efficiency of your cloud applications.
entry.summary: The App Optimize API is now available in Preview. This API helps you monitor, analyze, and improve the performance and cost-efficiency of your cloud applications.
entry.title: Announcement: App Optimize API now in Preview
